_comment: Map the names used in the sheet's staffing columns (Qsys/Pixera/Network/Tech) to Slack member IDs (U…). Names must match the sheet exactly, including any initial (e.g. 'Liam H'). On-call/remote tags are stripped before lookup. Member IDs are NOT secret. Unmapped names render as bold plain text instead of an @-mention. 'Danny M' = Danny Mannherz, 'Sam' = Sam Slade, and 'Keith' (Qsys, Jun 14) are EXTERNAL (Slack Connect) collaborators — their IDs don't appear in the Eos directory; grabbed via profile → Copy member ID. All resolved below. Note: external @-mentions only notify once those users are members of the deploy channel.
